title: SH 06A Nerv
wikitext:
[]: SH-06A Nerv Post by eclipsegaze » Sun May 31, 2009 1:55 pm Does anyone know if the SH-06A phone can be configured to work on a sim card type service provider here in the U.S I would love to have this phone but I know there may be compatibility issues and such. I have looked around google for information but its mostly in Japanese so of little use. If anyone can read Japanese or knows something about this phone drop me a line would ya?

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Sun May 31, 2009 3:26 pm First off, do you have the money?
